name: @stickerdex/desktop
description: StickerDex standalone Windows desktop app (Electron shell around the embedded Fastify server).
author: Christian Abele

scripts.build: npm run icon && npm run bundle
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron .
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run rebuild && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --dir
